_description: Depth-crossover sweep: model held fixed at claude (CLAUDE.md's model-fixed line, not a third dimension), all five arms, dcbench + swebench only (the two spec-strippable datasets), depths 1/2/3. The depth=1 cells here are the identical (dataset, arm=*, model=claude, full, 1) cells as headline_robustness.json's memory_line for dcbench/swebench -- configs/loader.py de-duplicates so they only run once.
